heading: Powers
label: 140706 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in the State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)14070636:5002., , .Oct. 23, 1992Pub. L. 102–484, title XVIII, § 1802106 Stat. 2581The words “and subject to the laws of such State” are omitted as unnecessary.
